rationale: The cited paper appears only as part of grouped background citations, not as a focal prior study that the 2002 paper builds on directly. In the body, it is used once as a supporting "see also" reference about buyer behavior and once in the general discussion as an example of work bridging sales-data and information-processing research. The citing paper does not develop specific hypotheses from Chandy et al. (2001), reuse its design or measures, or engage its findings in a distinct way.
